My Story

I'm a mission-focused Scrum Master with 8+ years of experience building and guiding high-performance Agile teams. I've directly managed teams of 45 members across 6 simultaneous projects — running dedicated sprint ceremonies for each.

As an experienced Jira Administrator, I build complex automation pipelines, custom workflows, and service desk portals. My Power BI dashboards integrated with Azure DevOps give stakeholders real-time delivery visibility.

Cloud exposure across AWS, GCP, Azure, and IBM means I collaborate deeply with engineering and DevOps teams. Currently at Mindfire Digital LLP, selectively open to exciting new opportunities.
